payload.label: towel
payload.short_description: white towel with gray text, edge-cropped
payload.long_description: Light ivory/beige terrycloth towel with faded gray block-print text ("LOVE" readable), hanging vertically and folded; right side of the towel is cropped by the image edge and the print looks worn; appears to be a small hand/kitchen towel approximately 0.5 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"towel","short_description":"white towel with gray text, edge-cropped","long_description":"Light ivory/beige terrycloth towel with faded gray block-print text (\"LOVE\" readable), hanging vertically and folded; right side of the towel is cropped by the image edge and the print looks worn; appears to be a small hand/kitchen towel approximately 0.5 meters from the camera.","attributes":["ivory/beige fabric","gray printed text ('LOVE' visible)","terry-cloth texture","folded and hanging","right edge cropped","faded/worn print","small hand-towel size"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.5}
